task_description: Calculate the compound interest on $1000 at 5% for 3 years.

task_description: Find the latest Python version and check if it supports pattern matching.

conversation.speaker: Agent (Thought)
conversation.text: I need to find the latest Python version and check for pattern matching support.

conversation.speaker: Environment
conversation.text: Python 3.13 is the latest stable release as of early 2026.

conversation.speaker: Agent (Thought)
conversation.text: Now let me check if pattern matching is supported.

conversation.speaker: Environment
conversation.text: Structural pattern matching (match/case) was introduced in Python 3.10 via PEP 634.

conversation.speaker: Agent (Thought)
conversation.text: Python 3.13 is the latest, and pattern matching has been available since 3.10.

conversation.speaker: Agent (Action)
conversation.text: send_message(text='The latest Python version is 3.13. Yes, it supports structural pattern matching (match/case statements), which was introduced in Python 3.10 via PEP 634.')
